name: io.github.anipotts/imessage-mcp
title: iMessage MCP
description: 26 tools for searching, analyzing, and exploring your iMessage history on macOS.

environmentVariables.name: IMESSAGE_SAFE_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to redact all message bodies. Returns only metadata.

environmentVariables.name: IMESSAGE_SYNC
environmentVariables.description: Message sync mode: 'off' (default), 'watch' (FSEvents, near-real-time), or 'poll:N' (every N seconds)
